title: Blocked Members
description: View and manage blocked members — authenticated users can see who they have blocked and unblock them from the account settings page. Block enforcement prevents blocked users from viewing the blocker's profiles, shops, listings, and purchasing their items.

steps.title: Fetch Blocked Members
steps.tooltip: Auth check via Supabase session. Returns all member_blocks rows where blocker_id = current user, joined with members table to resolve name, avatar_url, and slug. Ordered by created_at DESC.

steps.title: Resolve Member Details
steps.tooltip: Server service joins member_blocks with members table in two queries: first fetches block rows, then fetches member rows by blocked_id array. Builds a map of id → {name, avatar_url, slug} to avoid N+1 queries.

steps.title: Show Loading Skeleton
steps.tooltip: Four skeleton cards rendered while useBlockedMembers query is in-flight. role=status with aria-label for screen readers.

paths.label: Error
paths.detail: ErrorState banner with 'Try again' action that calls refetch()

paths.label: No
paths.detail: Empty state with shield icon and 'You have not blocked anyone'

flows.title: Unblock a Member
flows.trigger: User clicks Unblock on a BlockedMemberCard

steps.title: Click Unblock
steps.tooltip: Unblock button has aria-label='Unblock {name}'. Triggers useUnblockMember mutation. Button shows loading spinner while isPending.

steps.title: Remove from Cache
steps.tooltip: onMutate: cancels in-flight ['blocks', userId] queries, snapshots previous data, filters the unblocked member out of cache immediately. Rolled back on error.

steps.title: Delete Block Record
steps.tooltip: blocked_id passed as query param (?blocked_id={uuid}). Auth check via session. Deletes from member_blocks where blocker_id = current user AND blocked_id = param. Returns 404 if no matching row found.

errorCases.condition: blocked_id param is missing or empty
Block record not found (already unblocked or wrong user)

steps.title: Delete Row
steps.tooltip: DELETE from member_blocks WHERE blocker_id = blockerId AND blocked_id = blockedId. RLS policy enforces blocker_id = auth.uid(). Unique constraint on (blocker_id, blocked_id) means at most one row deleted.

steps.title: Invalidate Query Cache
steps.tooltip: onSettled always invalidates ['blocks', userId] to sync the server state after optimistic update.

steps.title: Show Success Toast
steps.tooltip: Toast: title 'Unblocked', description 'You unblocked {name}.' type=success.

steps.title: Show Error Toast
steps.tooltip: Toast: title 'Something went wrong', description 'Could not unblock this member. Please try again.' type=error. Optimistic cache removal is rolled back via onError snapshot restore.

paths.label: No
paths.detail: Optimistic removal is reversed, error toast shown

flows.title: View Blocked Member Profile
flows.trigger: User clicks a blocked member's name or avatar

steps.title: Click Member Profile
steps.tooltip: Both avatar and name are wrapped in AppLink. Href resolves to /member/{slug} if slug exists, otherwise /member/{blocked_id}.

steps.title: Navigate to Profile
steps.tooltip: Standard member profile page. Block relationship is not surfaced here yet — a 'Blocked' indicator on the profile page is a planned improvement.

steps.title: Show Blocked Badge
steps.notes: When viewing a member profile from the blocked list (or any profile of a member you have blocked), show a 'Blocked' indicator. This would let users confirm the block is active and access the unblock action without navigating to account settings.

flows.title: Block Enforcement — Profile Page
flows.trigger: Blocked user navigates to blocker's member profile

steps.title: Fetch Member by Slug
steps.tooltip: Server component calls getMemberBySlugServer(slug). If member not found, notFound() is called.

steps.title: Check Block Status
steps.tooltip: Calls isBlockedByServer(currentUserId, member.id). Uses server client with RLS policy member_blocks_select_blocked (blocked_id = auth.uid()). Short-circuits to false for null viewer or self-view.

steps.title: Show Not Found Page
steps.tooltip: If blocked, notFound() is called — identical to a non-existent member. No information leakage about the block.

flows.title: Block Enforcement — Shop Page
flows.trigger: Blocked user navigates to blocker's shop page

steps.title: Fetch Shop by Slug
steps.tooltip: Server component calls getShopBySlugServer(slug). Returns shop with owner_id. If shop not found, notFound() is called.

steps.title: Check Block Status
steps.tooltip: Calls isBlockedByServer(currentUserId, shop.owner_id). Block is checked against the shop owner, not the shop entity itself.

steps.title: Show Not Found Page
steps.tooltip: If blocked, notFound() is called — identical to a non-existent shop.

branches.condition: Is viewer blocked by shop owner?

flows.title: Block Enforcement — Listing Page
flows.trigger: Blocked user navigates to blocker's listing detail

steps.title: Fetch Listing with Seller
steps.tooltip: Server component calls getListingWithSellerServer(id). Returns listing with seller_id. If listing not found or inactive, notFound() is called.

steps.title: Check Block Status
steps.tooltip: Calls isBlockedByServer(currentUserId, listing.seller_id). Block is checked against the listing's seller.

steps.title: Show Not Found Page
steps.tooltip: If blocked, notFound() is called — identical to a non-existent listing.

flows.title: Block Enforcement — Cart
flows.trigger: Blocked user attempts to add blocker's listing to cart or validates cart containing blocked items

steps.title: Add to Cart (Blocked Seller)
steps.tooltip: addToCartServer checks isBlockedByServer(userId, listing.seller_id) after fetching listing. If blocked, throws 'Seller has blocked you'.

steps.title: Validate Cart (Blocked Items)
steps.tooltip: validateCartServer performs a single batch IN query on member_blocks for all unique seller IDs. Items from blocked sellers are moved to the 'removed' array with reason: 'blocked'.

steps.title: Show Removed Items Banner
steps.tooltip: Cart page stale items banner shows blocked items as removed. The 'blocked' reason is included in the CartValidationResult removed-item reason union type.
